_README: devkit-init domain selector. Each domain maps to a harness team seed carried in domains/<domain>/team/.claude/. Source of truth for the 100-team catalog: dev-tools templates/converted/index.json; this file is the curated domain view shipped with the pack.

web.title: Fullstack Web App
web.description: 풀스택 웹앱: 요구사항→설계→프론트→백엔드→테스트→배포. React/Next.js + API + DB.

mobile.title: Mobile App Builder
mobile.description: 모바일 앱 (범용). Flutter/iOS 네이티브 전용 팀은 아직 없음 — 콘텐츠 백로그.
mobile.caveat: generic mobile; no dedicated Flutter/iOS-native team yet

desktop.title: Desktop App
desktop.description: 데스크톱 앱: 스택 무관(Electron/.NET/Tauri/Qt/Flutter-desktop 어댑터) — 설계→구현→멀티 OS 검증→패키징·코드사이닝·자동업데이트.

_generic.title: Generic (fallback)
_generic.description: 최소 3역할 (architect/developer/qa). Flutter, iOS 네이티브 등 전용 팀이 없는 도메인의 정직한 fallback.
